name: SIGCRAFT
tagline: Self-improving prediction engine — 22+ data sources, Bayesian calibration, Kelly criterion sizing, auto-reweighting
description: Signal intelligence engine that ingests data from crypto exchanges, prediction markets (Polymarket, Metaculus, Manifold), news APIs, SEC filings, social media, and on-chain analytics. Scores predictions against reality. Auto-reweights which methods work. Kelly criterion position sizing for real trading signals. Built for the prediction market arbitrage meta.
content_angles: 22+ data sources: crypto, prediction markets, news, SEC filings, social sentiment, on-chain
Auto-calibration: the system scores itself and learns which signal sources actually predict outcomes
Kelly criterion position sizing — not vibes, math
Built for prediction market arbitrage across Polymarket, Metaculus, Manifold
